Paper Title: Modeling the Trajectory of Skeletal Muscle Hypertrophy During Resistance Training: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
Paper Summary: This meta-analysis pools 3237 measurements from 480 resistance training studies to model how muscle hypertrophy unfolds over the course of a training program rather than only comparing values from before and after training. The authors find that gains follow a curved pattern with the fastest growth occurring early in a training block and progressively smaller increases as training continues, a pattern that held up when accounting for age, sex, training experience, and how muscle size was measured.
Analytics Title: Netherlands 1-1 (2-3 pens) Morocco Stats: Bounou the Hero in Dramatic Shoot-out Win
Analytics Summary: Opta Analyst's recap of the Netherlands and Morocco round of 32 match applies the company's expected goals model to show that Morocco generated significantly more scoring chance quality across regulation and extra time despite the match ending level. The piece pairs that shot quality breakdown with goalkeeper Yassine Bounou's penalty shootout performance to illustrate how a team can control underlying chance creation yet still need a moment of individual brilliance to advance.
